en: If your company performs any of the following services and is required to maintain the relevant certification(s) for those services, you will be asked to provide your certificate in a subsequent form.
Spain Chamber of Commerce Certificate Applicability Assessment

The Spain Chamber of Commerce Certificate is an official document issued by the competent territorial Chamber of Commerce that certifies that a business appears in the Chamber’s public business census. It usually states details such as a company’s identification details, tax ID, registered address, and economic activity. Under Law 4 on the Basic Law of the Official Chambers of Commerce, Industry, Services, and Navigation, businesses that carry out commercial, industrial, service or shipping activities in Spain are automatically included in the relevant Chamber’s census. This certificate does not replace company incorporation or mercantile-registry documentation and does not by itself prove legal incorporation; instead, it confirms your business data as recorded in the Chamber’s public census on the date of issue, for use with authorities, customers or partners that require it. Royal Decree 669
